tasks.title: Weekly menu items still use placeholder image
tasks.evidence: 5 active weekly menu items reference /images/sea-moss-default.jpg fallback.
tasks.impact: Placeholder product photos hurt trust and conversion on /weekly-menu and product cards.
tasks.recommended_fix: Photograph or source real product images for each weekly-menu item and update data/products.ts image URLs.

tasks.title: No package lockfile in repo
tasks.evidence: No package-lock.json, pnpm-lock.yaml, or yarn.lock present.
tasks.recommended_fix: Regenerate lockfile with the active package manager and commit it.

tasks.title: Telegram notifier env vars not configured
tasks.evidence: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID are documented in .env.example but not set in Vercel.
tasks.impact: Blocks owner alerts and menu-intake workflow.
tasks.recommended_fix: Create a Telegram bot, add it to the owner chat/group, set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID in Vercel, and test npm run tog:notify:dry.

tasks.title: Vercel production deploy is not picking up GitHub pushes
tasks.evidence: Production still serves old build. PRoot vercel CLI/API calls hang or return invalidToken. GitHub Actions deploy workflow exists locally but cannot be pushed without workflow scope.
tasks.impact: Code fixes are not reaching customers.
tasks.recommended_fix: Refresh gh token with workflow scope, push .github/workflows/deploy.yml, and run the workflow; or fix the Vercel CLI token/team config.

tasks.title: ADMIN_API_TOKEN not set in production
tasks.evidence: Admin API routes require ADMIN_API_TOKEN; without it, admin automation and cron endpoints are unprotected or fail.
tasks.impact: Blocks secure admin automation and may leave admin endpoints open.
tasks.recommended_fix: Generate a strong random token, set ADMIN_API_TOKEN in Vercel production env, and store it in the local secrets file.
